name: dev.ucp.shopping.product_addons
title: Product Addons Extension
description: Extends Cart and Checkout with product addon selection on line items, allowing shoppers to select and change product addons (e.g., Warranty, Engraving, Gift Wrapping) at checkout time.

addon_choice.title: Addon Choice
addon_choice.description: A purchasable addon choice with availability and line item totals showing the cost if this addon were selected.

id.description: Addon item identifier. Used as selected_choice_id to select this choice.

title.description: Display title (e.g., '2-Year Extended Warranty', 'Custom Text Engraving').

default.description: Whether this is the default selection for the addon when the platform does not specify a selected_choice_id.

totals.description: Totals for this specific addon choice. Enables the platform to display the addon cost and compute price differences between choices.

item_addon.title: Item Addon
item_addon.description: A product addon on a line item with the current selection and available choices.

selected_choice_id.description: ID of the selected addon choice. On create, may be omitted to let the server select the default. Always present in responses.

choices.description: Available addon choices with pricing and availability.

item.title: Item with Product Addons
item.description: Item extended with product addon selections.

addons.description: Product addon selections for this item. When present, the server resolves pricing based on the product and selected addons. May be omitted on create — the server returns addons with default selections in the response.

line_item.title: Line Item with Product Addons
line_item.description: Line item with product addon support on the item.

dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.title: Checkout with Product Addons
dev.ucp.shopping.checkout.description: Checkout extended with product addon selection on line items.

dev.ucp.shopping.cart.title: Cart with Product Addons
dev.ucp.shopping.cart.description: Cart extended with product addon selection on line items.
